message:
refactor(bv): replace global WorkDir with explicit dir parameter

Remove package-level state from the bv (bead-view) package by
requiring callers to pass the working directory explicitly.

API changes:
- Remove global WorkDir variable
- Add dir string parameter to all public functions:
  - GetInsights(dir), GetPriority(dir), GetPlan(dir), GetRecipes(dir)
  - CheckDrift(dir), GetTopBottlenecks(dir, n), GetNextActions(dir, n)
  - GetParallelTracks(dir), IsBottleneck(dir, id), IsKeystone(dir, id)
- Internal run() function now takes dir as first parameter

Benefits:
- Eliminates race conditions when multiple goroutines use bv
- Makes dependencies explicit and testable
- Enables concurrent bv operations on different directories
- Aligns with Go idioms for avoiding global state

Test updates:
- All test functions updated to pass "." or explicit test directories
- Maintains same test coverage with new API

Callers updated:
- Dashboard's fetchHealthStatus() passes m.projectDir to CheckDrift()
- Other callers will be updated in subsequent commits
